releaseNotes: Fixed screen loads that could stay stuck when an API request failed instead of surfacing an error state
Rebuilt the Intelligence surface with stronger weather, movement, translation, and report actions
Improved assistant reliability and synced AI automation changes back to native device services
Stabilized settings autosave with explicit success and failure popups and blank-title validation support
Added a new Quests page with daily backend-generated wellness quests that refresh by day without an app update
